```{r}
  #######################################################################
  #Create tables with the variables in the same order as in the equations
  #######################################################################
  tablename<-paste("Variables",j, sep="")
  values<-setNames(data.frame(matrix(ncol = length(Symbols_var), nrow = n_periods)), Symbols_var)
  for (v in 1:length(Symbols_var)){values[,v]<-eval(parse(text=(paste(noquote(Symbols_var[v])))))}
  assign (tablename,round(values, 8))
  #######################################################
  #Create tables with the variables listed alphabetically
  #######################################################
  tablename<-paste("Variables_sorted",j, sep="")
  values<-setNames(data.frame(matrix(ncol = length(Symbols_var_sort), nrow = n_periods)), Symbols_var_sort)
  for (v in 1:length(Symbols_var_sort)){values[,v]<-eval(parse(text=(paste(noquote(Symbols_var_sort[v])))))}
  assign (tablename,round(values, 6))
  #########################################################
  #Create a table with the parameters listed alphabetically
  #########################################################
  tablename<-paste("Parameters_sorted",j, sep="")
  values<-setNames(data.frame(matrix(ncol = length(Symbols_par_sort), nrow = 1)), Symbols_par_sort)
  for (v in 1:length(Symbols_par_sort)){values[,v]<-eval(parse(text=(paste(noquote(Symbols_par_sort[v])))))}
  assign (tablename,round(values,4))
  rm(values)
  ###############################
  #Save the tables as excel files
  ###############################
  write.csv(get(paste0("Variables",j)), paste0("Variables",j,".csv"))
  write.csv(get(paste0("Variables_sorted",j)), paste0("Variables-sorted",j,".csv"))
  write.csv(get(paste0("Parameters_sorted",j)), paste0("Parameters-sorted",j,".csv"))
  }
```

CHART INFO

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(ggthemes) 
library(showtext)
library(sysfonts)
library(showtextdb)
showtext_auto()
Colour1="#000000" 
Colour2="#009E73" 
Colour3="#D55E00" 
Colour4="#0072B2"
Linetype1="solid"
Linetype2="solid" 
Linetype3="solid"
Linetype4="solid"
pch1=26
pch2=26
pch3=26
pch4=26
Size1=0.8
Size2=0.8
Size3=0.8
Size4=0.8
Scenario1="Baseline"
Scenario2="Green securitisation"
Scenario3="Green securitisation and green loan subsidy"
Scenario4="Green sec. and green loan subsidy - Case I"
Scenario5="Green sec. and green loan subsidy - Case II"
Periods<-1:n_periods   

Chart3<-function(fig_title, variable, label, min, max, sce1, sce2, sce3, legend_x, legend_y){
  eval(parse(text=(paste0("Line1=Variables", sce1, "[,c('",variable,"')]")))) 
  eval(parse(text=(paste0("Line2=Variables", sce2, "[,c('",variable,"')]")))) 
  eval(parse(text=(paste0("Line3=Variables", sce3, "[,c('",variable,"')]")))) 
  dataframe<<-data.frame(Periods, Line1, Line2, Line3)
  data_long<<-melt(dataframe, id ="Periods")
  
  plot<-ggplot(data=data_long, aes(x=Periods, y=value, colour=variable, linetype=variable, linewidth=variable, shape=variable)) + 
    geom_line(aes(linetype = variable, linewidth = variable)) + 
    geom_point(aes(shape = variable)) +  
    scale_color_manual(name=NULL, labels=c(eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce1)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce2)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce3))))), values=c(Colour1, Colour2, Colour3))+
    scale_linetype_manual(name=NULL, labels=c(eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce1)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce2)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce3))))), values=c(Linetype1, Linetype2, Linetype3)) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(name=NULL, labels=c(eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce1)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce2)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce3))))), values=c(Size1, Size2, Size3))  +
    scale_shape_manual(name=NULL, labels=c(eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce1)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce2)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce3))))), values=as.numeric(c(pch1,pch2,pch3)))+
    theme_bw()+
    theme(text=element_text(family="lato"),
          axis.title=element_text(size=32, colour="black"),
          axis.text=element_text(size=30, colour="black"),
          axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
          legend.position=c(legend_x, legend_y),
          legend.title=element_blank(),
          legend.text=element_text(size=30, colour="black"),
          legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
          legend.key.height = unit(0, "cm"),
          legend.key=element_blank(),
          legend.background=element_blank(),
          legend.box.background=element_blank(), 
          plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
          panel.border=element_rect(color = "black", linewidth=0.8),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', colour = "grey"),
          panel.grid.minor = element_line(linewidth = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', colour = "grey"))+
    labs(y =label, x ="Year")+
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = 1, xmax = n_periods, ymin=min, ymax=max),fill = "transparent")+
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(min, max))+
        scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),
                       breaks = c(n_periods - 27, n_periods - 20, n_periods - 15, n_periods - 10, n_periods - 5, n_periods),
                       labels = c(2023, 2030, 2035, 2040, 2045, 2050)) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))
  ggsave(fig_title, plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
}

Chart4<-function(fig_title, variable, label, min, max, sce1, sce2, sce3, sce4, legend_x, legend_y){
  eval(parse(text=(paste0("Line1=Variables", sce1, "[,c('",variable,"')]")))) 
  eval(parse(text=(paste0("Line2=Variables", sce2, "[,c('",variable,"')]")))) 
  eval(parse(text=(paste0("Line3=Variables", sce3, "[,c('",variable,"')]")))) 
  eval(parse(text=(paste0("Line4=Variables", sce4, "[,c('",variable,"')]"))))  
  dataframe<<-data.frame(Periods, Line1, Line2, Line3, Line4)
  data_long <- melt(dataframe, id = "Periods")
  
  plot<-ggplot(data=data_long, aes(x=Periods, y=value, colour = variable, linetype=variable, linewidth=variable, shape=variable)) + 
    geom_line()+
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_manual(name=NULL, labels=c(eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce1)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce2)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce3)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce4))))), 
                       values=c(Colour1, Colour2, Colour3, Colour4))+
    scale_linetype_manual(name=NULL, labels=c(eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce1)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce2)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce3)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce4))))), 
                          values=c(Linetype1, Linetype2, Linetype3, Linetype4)) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(name=NULL, labels=c(eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce1)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce2)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce3)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce4))))),
                      values=c(Size1, Size2, Size3, Size4))  +
    scale_shape_manual(name=NULL, labels=c(eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce1)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce2)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce3)))), eval(parse(text=(paste0("Scenario",sce4))))), 
                       values=as.numeric(c(pch1,pch2,pch3, pch4)))+
    theme_bw()+
    theme(text=element_text(family="lato"),
          axis.title=element_text(size=31, colour="black"),
          axis.text=element_text(size=30, colour="black"),
          axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
          legend.position=c(legend_x, legend_y),
          legend.title=element_blank(),
          legend.text=element_text(size=30, colour="black"),
          legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
          legend.key.height = unit(0, "cm"),
          legend.key=element_blank(),
          legend.background=element_blank(),
          legend.box.background=element_blank(), 
          plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
          panel.border=element_rect(color = "black", linewidth=0.8),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', colour = "grey"),
          panel.grid.minor = element_line(linewidth = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', colour = "grey"))+
    labs(y =label, x ="Year")+
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = 1, xmax = n_periods, ymin=min, ymax=max),fill = "transparent")+
   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),
                       breaks = c(n_periods - 27, n_periods - 20, n_periods - 15, n_periods - 10, n_periods - 5, n_periods),
                       labels = c(2023, 2030, 2035, 2040, 2045, 2050)) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))
  ggsave(fig_title, plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
}
```

CREATE CHARTS

```{r}
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-a-s.jpeg", variable='s',label="Share of securitised loans",min=0.05,max=0.2,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-b-CR_H.jpeg", variable='CR_H',label="Total credit rationing",min=0.1,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-c-CAR.jpeg", variable='CAR',label="Capital adequacy ratio",min=0.11,max=0.125,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-d-g_LH.jpeg", variable='g_LH',label="Growth rate of mortgages",min=0.01,max=0.03,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-e-g_Yper.jpeg", variable='g_Yper',label="Growth rate of output (%)",min=1.75,max=2.75,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-f-p_M.jpeg", variable='p_M',label="Price of MBSs",min=0.9,max=1.1,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-g-SEC_Yper.jpeg", variable='SEC_Yper',label="Government debt-to-GDP (%)",min=85,max=92,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-h-beta_H.jpeg", variable='beta_H',label="Share of green houses",min=0.32,max=0.38,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-i-g_pHper.jpeg", variable='g_PHper',label="Growth rate of housing prices (%)",min=-0.05,max=0.1,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-j-dsr_HW.jpeg", variable='dsr_HW',label="Household debt service ratio",min=0.17,max=0.19,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-k-lev_IF.jpeg", variable='lev_IF',label="Leverage ratio of IFs",min=5,max=7,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-l-lev_MMF.jpeg", variable='lev_MMF',label="Leverage ratio of MMFs",min=2,max=2.4,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-m-EMIS_O.jpeg", variable='EMIS_O',label=expression("Other CO" [2]*" emissions (Gt)"),min=0,max=4,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-n-EMIS_H.jpeg", variable='EMIS_H',label=expression("Housing CO" [2]*" emissions (Gt)"),min=0,max=2,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-o-CI_H.jpeg", variable='CI_H',label="Carbon int. housing emissions",min=0,max=0.05,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-p-CI_O.jpeg", variable='CI_O',label="Carbon int. other emissions",min=0,max=0.25,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-q-lev.jpeg", variable='lev',label="Firm leverage",min=0,max=0.2,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-r-lev_HW.jpeg", variable='lev_HW',label="Household leverage",min=0.8,max=1.1,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-s-lev_B.jpeg", variable='lev_B',label="Leverage ratio of banks",min=10,max=25,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-t-def_HW.jpeg", variable='def_HW',label="Default rate on loans",min=0.018,max=0.022,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-u-yield_M.jpeg", variable='yield_M',label="Yield for MBSs",min=0,max=0.1,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-v-g_LHG.jpeg", variable='g_LHG',label="Growth rate of green mortgages",min=0,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-w-g_LHC.jpeg", variable='g_LHC',label="Growth rate of conv. mortgages",min=-0.1,max=0.1,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-x-CR_HG.jpeg", variable='CR_HG',label="Green credit rationing",min=0.1,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-y-CR_HC.jpeg", variable='CR_HC',label="Conv. credit rationing",min=0.1,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z1-spr_H.jpeg", variable='spr_H',label="Total spread",min=0.0075,max=0.0125,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z2-spr_HG.jpeg", variable='spr_HG',label="Green spread",min=0.0075,max=0.0125,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z3-spr_HC.jpeg", variable='spr_HC',label="Conv. spread",min=0.0075,max=0.0125,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z4-illiqWH.jpeg", variable='illiq_HW',label="Illiqduidity ratio",min=0.95,max=1.05,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z5-g_HD.jpeg", variable='g_HD',label="Growth rate of housing demand",min=-0.8,max=0.8,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z6-g_HS.jpeg", variable='g_HS',label="Growth rate of housing supply",min=-0.3,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z7-rent.jpeg", variable='rent',label="Rent rate",min=0.015,max=0.22,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z8-g_HDrent.jpeg", variable='g_HDrent',label="Growth rate of demanded rented houses",min=-1,max=4,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z9-g_HSrent.jpeg", variable='g_HSrent',label="Growth rate of supplied rented houses",min=-0.3,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z10-r_SH.jpeg", variable='r_SH',label="Rate of return on shares issued by MMFs",min=0,max=0.05,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z11-yield_M.jpeg", variable='yield_M',label="Yield of MBSs",min=0,max=0.05,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z12-g_MMMF.jpeg", variable='g_MMMF',label="Growth rate of the value of green MBSs held by MMFs ",min=-0.05,max=0.05,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z13-g_MIF.jpeg", variable='g_MIF',label="Growth rate of the value of green MBSs held by IFs ",min=-0.08,max=0.05,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z14-g_mMMF.jpeg", variable='g_mMMF',label="Growth rate of the number of green MBSs held by MMFs ",min=-0.05,max=0.05,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z15-g_mIF.jpeg", variable='g_mIF',label="Growth rate of the number of green MBSs held by IFs ",min=-0.08,max=0.05,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart3(fig_title="SB;Fig2-z16-haircut.jpeg", variable='haircut',label="Haircut on repos",min=0.2,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=2, sce3=3, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)

#Figure A.1
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-a-g_Yper.jpeg", variable='g_Yper',label="Growth rate of output (%)",min=1.75,max=2.75,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-b-g_PHper.jpeg", variable='g_PHper',label="Growth rate of housing prices (%)",min=-0.05,max=0.1,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-c-EMIS_H.jpeg", variable='EMIS_H',label=expression("Housing CO" [2]*" emissions (Gt)"),min=0,max=2,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-d-CAR.jpeg", variable='CAR',label="Capital adequacy ratio",min=0.11,max=0.125,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-e-dsr_HW.jpeg", variable='dsr_HW',label="Household debt service ratio",min=0.17,max=0.2,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-f-spr_HG.jpeg", variable='spr_HG',label="Green spread",min=0.0075,max=0.0125,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-g-spr_HC.jpeg", variable='spr_HC',label="Conv. spread",min=0.0075,max=0.0125,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-h-spr_H.jpeg", variable='spr_H',label="Total spread",min=0.0075,max=0.0125,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-i-beta_H.jpeg", variable='beta_H',label="Share of green houses",min=0.32,max=0.4, sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-j-g_HD.jpeg", variable='g_HD',label="Growth rate of housing demand",min=-0.03,max=0.2,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-k-CI_H.jpeg", variable='CI_H',label="Carbon int. housing emissions",min=0,max=0.01,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-l-g_HS.jpeg", variable='g_HS',label="Growth rate of housing supply",min=0,max=0.03,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-m-EMIS_O.jpeg", variable='EMIS_O',label=expression("Other CO" [2]*" emissions (Gt)"),min=0,max=4,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-n-p_H.jpeg", variable='p_H',label="Housing prices",min=0.21,max=0.23,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-o-p_M.jpeg", variable='p_M',label="Price of MBSs",min=0.5,max=1.5,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-p-lev_IF.jpeg", variable='lev_IF',label="Leverage ratio of IFs",min=4,max=10,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-q-lev_MMF.jpeg", variable='lev_MMF',label="Leverage ratio of MMFs",min=1,max=4,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-r-SEC_Yper.jpeg", variable='SEC_Yper',label="Government debt-to-GDP (%)",min=70,max=100,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-s-g_LH.jpeg", variable='g_LH',label="Growth rate of mortgages",min=0,max=0.05,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-t-CR_H.jpeg", variable='CR_H',label="Total credit rationing",min=0.1,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-u-CR_HG.jpeg", variable='CR_HG',label="Green credit rationing",min=0.1,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)
Chart4(fig_title="SB;FigA.1-v-CR_HC.jpeg", variable='CR_HC',label="Conv. credit rationing",min=0.1,max=0.3,sce1=1, sce2=3, sce3=4, sce4=5, legend_x=0.35, legend_y=0.92)

```

COUNT THE EQUATIONS

```{r}
code_lines<-capture.output(Equations) 
extract_variables<-function(code_lines) {
  valid_lines<-grep("<<-", code_lines, value = TRUE)
 matches<-regmatches(valid_lines, regexpr("^[^\\[]+", valid_lines))
  return(matches)
}
variables<-extract_variables(code_lines)
Equations_numbering<-cbind(Variable=variables, Equation = seq_along(variables))
Equations_numbering<- as.data.frame(Equations_numbering, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
Equations_numbering$Variable <- trimws(Equations_numbering$Variable)
Equations_numbering$Equation <- trimws(Equations_numbering$Equation)
```

LATEX TABLE WITH INITIAL VALUES FOR ENDOGENOUS VARIABLES

```{r}
library(xtable)
########################################################
#Create a table with the symbols and the initial values
########################################################
column_names<-colnames(Variables_sorted1)
first_row_values<-round(Variables_sorted1[1, ],4)
transposed_first_row_values<-t(first_row_values)
Table_variables<-cbind(column_names,transposed_first_row_values)
colnames(Table_variables)<-c("Symbol","Initial value")
rownames(Table_variables) <- NULL
Table_variables <- as.data.frame(Table_variables)
############################
#Add the description column
############################
code_lines <- capture.output(Parameters_InitialValues) 
extract_comment <- function(var, code_lines) {
line_with_comment <- grep(paste0("\\b", var, "\\[1\\]<<-"), code_lines, value = TRUE)
  if (length(line_with_comment) > 0) {
    comment <- sub(".*#\\s*(.*?)\\s*##.*", "\\1", line_with_comment)
    return(trimws(comment))  
  } else {
    return(NA)  
  }
}
Table_variables$Description<- sapply(Table_variables$Symbol, extract_comment, code_lines= code_lines)
Table_variables<-Table_variables[, c("Symbol", "Description", "Initial value")]
############################
#Add the category column
############################
code_lines <- capture.output(Parameters_InitialValues) 
free_start <- grep("#Free", code_lines)
model_constrained_start <- grep("#Model-constrained", code_lines)
free_vars <- character(0)
model_constrained_vars <- character(0)
# Extract variables from 'Free' section
if (length(free_start) > 0) {
next_start <- min(c(model_constrained_start, length(code_lines) + 1))
  free_lines <- code_lines[(free_start + 1):(next_start - 1)]
  free_vars <- grep("<<-", free_lines, value = TRUE)
  free_vars <- sub("\\s*<<-.*", "", free_vars)  
  free_vars <- gsub("\\[.*", "", free_vars)  
  free_vars <- trimws(free_vars)  
}

# Extract variables from 'Model-constrained' section
if (length(model_constrained_start) > 0) {
 model_constrained_lines <- code_lines[(model_constrained_start + 1):length(code_lines)] 
  model_constrained_vars <- grep("<<-", model_constrained_lines, value = TRUE)
  model_constrained_vars <- sub("\\s*<<-.*", "", model_constrained_vars)  
  model_constrained_vars <- gsub("\\[.*", "", model_constrained_vars)  
  model_constrained_vars <- trimws(model_constrained_vars) 
}

# Function to categorise the variables
categorize_variables <- function(var) {
  if (var %in% free_vars) {
    return("Free")
  } else if (var %in% model_constrained_vars) {
    return("Model-constrained")
  } else {
    return(NA) 
  }
}

Table_variables$Category <- sapply(Table_variables$Symbol, categorize_variables)
Table_variables <- Table_variables[, c("Symbol", "Description", "Category", "Initial value")]
colnames(Table_variables)[colnames(Table_variables) == "Category"] <- "Variable category"

##############################
#Add the source/remarks column 
##############################
code_lines <- capture.output(Parameters_InitialValues) 
extract_comment <- function(var, code_lines) {
line_with_comment <- grep(paste0("\\b", var, "\\[1\\]<<-"), code_lines, value = TRUE)
  if (length(line_with_comment) > 0) {
      comment <- sub(".*##\\s*([^#]*?)\\s*$", "\\1", line_with_comment)
    return(trimws(comment))  
  } else {
    return(NA)  
  }
}
Table_variables$Sources<- sapply(Table_variables$Symbol, extract_comment, code_lines= code_lines)
Table_variables<-Table_variables[, c("Symbol", "Description", "Variable category", "Initial value","Sources")]
colnames(Table_variables)[colnames(Table_variables) == "Sources"] <- "Source/remarks"
##########################################################
#Add the number of equations in the source/remarks column
##########################################################
replace <- function(Table_variables, Equations_numbering) {
  lookup <- setNames(as.character(Equations_numbering[, 2]), Equations_numbering[, 1])
  variable_pattern <- paste0("\\b(", paste(names(lookup), collapse = "|"), ")\\b")
  Table_variables[, 5] <- sapply(Table_variables[, 5], function(x) {
    if (is.na(x)) {
      return("")  
    }
        x <- trimws(x)
    for (var in names(lookup)) {
      if (grepl(var, x)) {
        x <- gsub(paste0("\\b", var, "\\b"), lookup[var], x)
        }
    }
    return(x)
  })
  return(Table_variables)
}
  Table_variables<- replace(Table_variables, Equations_numbering)
##########################
#Create the table in latex
##########################
Table_variables$Symbol<- paste0("$", Table_variables$Symbol, "$")
Latex_table_variables<- xtable(Table_variables)
Latex_code <- capture.output(print(Latex_table_variables,  include.rownames = FALSE, sanitize.colnames.function = function(x) paste0("\\textbf{", x, "}"), type = "latex"))
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\verb\\|([^|]+)\\|", "\\1", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("_(\\w+)", "_{\\1}", Latex_code, perl=TRUE)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\^(\\w+)", "^{\\1}", Latex_code, perl=TRUE)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\\\$", "\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\_", "_", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("(\\w+_\\{\\w+\\})", "\\$\\1\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("(\\w+\\^\\{[^}]+\\})", "\\$\\1\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\$\\$", "\\$", Latex_code)

for (greek in greek_letters) {

  Latex_code <- gsub(
    paste0("\\$(.*?)", "(?<![a-zA-Z0-9])", greek, "(?![a-zA-Z0-9])", "(.*?)\\$"), 
    paste0("\\$", "\\\\", greek, "\\$", "\\1\\2"), 
    Latex_code, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE
  )
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(_)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, "_{\\3}"), Latex_code)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(_\\{)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(\\})"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, "_{\\3}"), Latex_code)
 Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\b\\\\eta", "\\\\beta", Latex_code)
 Latex_code <- gsub("th\\\\eta", "\\theta", Latex_code)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=\\s)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=[A-Z])"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, " "), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=\\$)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("\\\\", greek), 
                     paste0("\\", greek), Latex_code)
 
}
 
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\begin\\{tabular\\}\\{lllll\\}", "\\\\begin{tabular}{lp{6cm}llp{5cm}}", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\begin\\{tabular\\}", "\\\\begin{longtable}", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\end\\{tabular\\}", "\\\\end{longtable}", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\begin\\{table\\}", "", Latex_code)       
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\end\\{table\\}", "", Latex_code)  
Latex_code <- gsub("\\[ht\\]", "", Latex_code)
writeLines(Latex_code, "Latex_Table_variables.tex")
Latex_preamble <- "
\\documentclass{article}
\\usepackage[a4paper, left=1cm, right=1cm, top=2cm, bottom=2cm]{geometry} 
\\usepackage{longtable}
\\begin{document}
"
Latex_footer <- "
\\end{document}
"
Full_latex_code <- paste(Latex_preamble, paste(Latex_code, collapse = "\n"), Latex_footer, sep = "\n")
writeLines(Full_latex_code, "Latex_Table_variables.tex")
```

LATEX TABLE WITH PARAMETER VALUES

```{r}
library(xtable)
########################################################
#Create a table with the symbols and the parameter values
########################################################
column_names<-colnames(Parameters_sorted1)
first_row_values<-round(Parameters_sorted1[1, ],4)
transposed_first_row_values<-t(first_row_values)
Table_parameters<-cbind(column_names,transposed_first_row_values)
colnames(Table_parameters)<-c("Symbol","Value")
rownames(Table_parameters)<- NULL
Table_parameters<-as.data.frame(Table_parameters)
Table_parameters$Symbol<-trimws(Table_parameters$Symbol)
############################
#Add the description column
############################
code_lines<-capture.output(Parameters_InitialValues) 
extract_comment<-function(par, code_lines) {
line_with_comment <- grep(paste0("\\b", par,"\\s*<<-"), code_lines, value = TRUE)
  if (length(line_with_comment) > 0) {
    comment <- sub(".*#\\s*(.*?)\\s*##.*", "\\1", line_with_comment)
    return(trimws(comment))  
  } else {
    return(NA)  
  }
}
Table_parameters$Description<- sapply(Table_parameters$Symbol, extract_comment, code_lines= code_lines)
Table_parameters<-Table_parameters[, c("Symbol", "Description", "Value")]
########################
#Add the category column
########################
code_lines <- capture.output(Parameters_InitialValues) 
free_start <- grep("#Free", code_lines)
data_determined_start <- grep("#Data-determined", code_lines)
model_constrained_start <- grep("#Model-constrained", code_lines)
free_pars <- character(0)
model_constrained_pars <- character(0)

# Extract variables from 'Free' section
if (length(free_start) > 0) {
next_start <- min(c(model_constrained_start, length(code_lines) + 1))
  free_lines <- code_lines[(free_start + 1):(next_start - 1)]
  free_pars <- grep("<<-", free_lines, value = TRUE)
  free_pars <- sub("\\s*<<-.*", "", free_pars)  
  free_pars <- trimws(free_pars)  
}


# Extract variables from 'Model-constrained' section
if (length(model_constrained_start) > 0) {
  model_constrained_lines <- code_lines[(model_constrained_start + 1):length(code_lines)] 
  model_constrained_pars <- grep("<<-", model_constrained_lines, value = TRUE)
  model_constrained_pars <- sub("\\s*<<-.*", "", model_constrained_pars)  
  model_constrained_pars <- trimws(model_constrained_pars) 
}

# Function to categorize the parameters
categorize_parameters <- function(par) {
  if (par %in% free_pars) {
    return("Free")
  } else if (par %in% model_constrained_pars) {
    return("Model-constrained")
  } else {
    return(NA) 
  }
}

Table_parameters$Category<-sapply(Table_parameters$Symbol, categorize_parameters)
Table_parameters<-Table_parameters[, c("Symbol", "Description", "Category", "Value")]
colnames(Table_parameters)[colnames(Table_parameters) == "Category"] <- "Parameter category"
##############################
#Add the source/remarks column 
##############################
code_lines<-capture.output(Parameters_InitialValues) 
extract_comment<-function(par, code_lines) {
line_with_comment <- grep(paste0("\\b", par,"\\s*<<-"), code_lines, value = TRUE)
  if (length(line_with_comment) > 0) {
    comment <- sub(".*##\\s*([^#]*?)\\s*$", "\\1", line_with_comment)
    return(trimws(comment))  
  } else {
    return(NA)  
  }
}

Table_parameters$Sources<- sapply(Table_parameters$Symbol, extract_comment, code_lines= code_lines)
Table_parameters<-Table_parameters[, c("Symbol", "Description", "Parameter category", "Value","Sources")]
colnames(Table_parameters)[colnames(Table_parameters) == "Sources"] <- "Source/remarks"

##########################################################
#Add the number of equations in the source/remarks column
##########################################################
replace <- function(Table_parameters, Equations_numbering) {
  lookup <- setNames(as.character(Equations_numbering[, 2]), Equations_numbering[, 1])
  variable_pattern <- paste0("\\b(", paste(names(lookup), collapse = "|"), ")\\b")
  Table_parameters[, 5] <- sapply(Table_parameters[, 5], function(x) {
    if (is.na(x)) {
      return("")  
    }
        x <- trimws(x)
    for (var in names(lookup)) {
      if (grepl(var, x)) {
        x <- gsub(paste0("\\b", var, "\\b"), lookup[var], x)
        }
    }
    return(x)
  })
  return(Table_parameters)
}
  Table_parameters<- replace(Table_parameters, Equations_numbering)

####################################
#Create the table in Latex
####################################
Table_parameters$Symbol<- paste0("$", Table_parameters$Symbol, "$")
Latex_table_parameters<- xtable(Table_parameters)
Latex_code <- capture.output(print(Latex_table_parameters,  include.rownames = FALSE, sanitize.colnames.function = function(x) paste0("\\textbf{", x, "}"), type = "latex"))
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\verb\\|([^|]+)\\|", "\\1", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("_(\\w+)", "_{\\1}", Latex_code, perl=TRUE)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\^(\\w+)", "^{\\1}", Latex_code, perl=TRUE)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\\\$", "\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\_", "_", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("(\\w+_\\{\\w+\\})", "\\$\\1\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("(\\w+\\^\\{[^}]+\\})", "\\$\\1\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\$\\$", "\\$", Latex_code)

for (greek in greek_letters) {
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("\\$(.*?)\\$", "(?<![a-zA-Z0-9])", greek, "(?![a-zA-Z0-9])"), 
                     paste0("\\$", "\\\\", greek, "\\$", "\\1"), Latex_code, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(_)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, "_{\\3}"), Latex_code)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(_\\{)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(\\})"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, "_{\\3}"), Latex_code)
 Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\b\\\\eta", "\\\\beta", Latex_code)
 Latex_code <- gsub("th\\\\eta", "\\theta", Latex_code)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=\\s)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=[A-Z])"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, " "), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
 Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=\\$)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
}

Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\begin\\{tabular\\}\\{lllll\\}", "\\\\begin{tabular}{lp{6cm}llp{5cm}}", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\begin\\{tabular\\}", "\\\\begin{longtable}", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\end\\{tabular\\}", "\\\\end{longtable}", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\begin\\{table\\}", "", Latex_code)       
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\end\\{table\\}", "", Latex_code)  
Latex_code <- gsub("\\[ht\\]", "", Latex_code)
writeLines(Latex_code, "Latex_Table_parameters.tex")
Latex_preamble <- "
\\documentclass{article}
\\usepackage[a4paper, left=1cm, right=1cm, top=2cm, bottom=2cm]{geometry} 
\\usepackage{longtable}
\\begin{document}
"
Latex_footer <- "
\\end{document}
"
Full_latex_code <- paste(Latex_preamble, paste(Latex_code, collapse = "\n"), Latex_footer, sep = "\n")
writeLines(Full_latex_code, "Latex_Table_parameters.tex")

```

EQUATIONS IN LATEX FORMAT

```{r}
Latex_code<-capture.output(Equations) 
Latex_code<-Latex_code[grep("<<-",Latex_code)]
Latex_code<-gsub("<<-", "=",Latex_code)
Latex_code<- gsub("_(\\w+\\[t(-1)?\\])", "_{\\1}", Latex_code)
Latex_code<- gsub("_(\\w+)", "_{\\1}", Latex_code)
Latex_code<- gsub("(\\w+)_\\{(\\w+)\\}(\\[t(-1)?\\])", "\\1_{\\2\\3}", Latex_code)
Latex_code<- gsub("(?<!\\{)\\[t\\](?!\\})", "_{[t]}", Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
Latex_code<- gsub("(?<!\\{)\\[t-1\\](?!\\})", "_{[t-1]}", Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
Latex_code<- gsub("exp\\(([^)]+)\\)", "e^{\\1}", Latex_code)
Latex_code<- gsub("([^=]+)=([^/]+)\\/([^\\s]+)", "\\1=\\frac{\\2}{\\3}", Latex_code)
Latex_code<- gsub("frac", "\\\\frac", Latex_code)
Latex_code<- gsub("\\\\frac\\{\\(([^)]+)\\)\\}\\{([^}]+)\\}", "\\\\frac{\\1}{\\2}", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\[t\\]", "t", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\[t-1\\]", "t-1", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("pmin", "min", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("pmax", "max", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("log\\((\\w+_\\{\\w+\\})\\)", "ln\\1", Latex_code)


for (greek in greek_letters) {
  
Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(?<!\\\\)\\b(", greek, ")(?=\\b|_)"), 
                   paste0("\\\\", "\\1"), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(\\\\", greek, ")(?=[a-zA-Z])"), 
                     "\\1 ", Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(\\\\", greek, ")(_)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)"), 
                     "\\1_{\\3}", Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(\\\\", greek, ")(_\\{)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(\\})"), 
                    "\\1_{\\3}", Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\b\\\\eta", "\\\\beta", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("th\\\\eta", "\\theta", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=\\s)"), 
                  paste0("\\\\", greek), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=[A-Z])"), 
                 paste0("\\\\", greek, " "), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)

}

Latex_code<-gsub("\\*", " ", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\cdot", "", Latex_code)

generate_latex_with_label <- function(Latex_code) {
  lhs <- strsplit(Latex_code, "=")[[1]][1]
  lhs <- gsub("[[:space:]]", "", lhs)  
  Latex_code<- paste0("\\begin{equation}\n", 
                      "\\label{eq:", lhs, "}\n",
                       Latex_code, "\n", 
                       "\\end{equation}")
  return(Latex_code)

}  


Final_latex_code <- sapply(Latex_code, generate_latex_with_label)

for (greek in greek_letters) {
  Final_latex_code <- gsub(
    paste0("eq:\\\\", greek), 
    paste0("eq:", greek), 
    Final_latex_code, 
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )

}
  
Latex_preamble <- "
\\documentclass{article}
\\usepackage{amsmath}
\\usepackage[a4paper, left=2cm, right=2cm, top=2cm, bottom=2cm]{geometry} 
\\begin{document}
"

Latex_footer <- "
\\end{document}
"
Latex_code <- paste(Latex_preamble, paste(Final_latex_code, collapse = "\n"), Latex_footer, sep = "\n")
writeLines(Latex_code, "Latex_Equations.tex")
```

BASELINE MODEL

```{r}
sce <- 1
if (sce == 1) {
var1<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[2, "g_Y"])
var2<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[3, "g_Y"])
var3<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[27, "g_Y"])
var4<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[12, "HG_HC"])
var5<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[12, "KG_KC"])
var6<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_WOwn"])
var7<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_IRent"])
var8<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_IOwn"])
var9<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_Vacant"])
var10<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_Total"])
var11<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_Totalred"])
var12<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_WNewOwnOccup"])
var13<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_IRentedSold"])
var14<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_WOwnOccup"])
var15<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_INewRented"])
var16<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_IOwnOccupRented"])
var17<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_ConstrVacant"])
var18<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_IRentedVacant"])
var19<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_IRentedSoldVacant"])
var20<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_WOwnOccupVacant"])
var21<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_INewOwnOccup"])
var22<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_IRentedSoldMarket"])
var23<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_IOwnOccupRentedMarket"])
var24<-sprintf ("%.3f", Variables1[1, "H_WOwnOccupMarket"])

cat ("SCENARIO", sce, " ")
cat ("g_Y(2024):", var1," ")
cat ("g_Y(2025):", var2," ")
cat ("g_Y(2050):", var3," ")
cat ("HG_HC(2034):", var4," ")
cat ("KG_KC(2034):", var5," ")
cat ("H_WOwn(2023):", var6," ")
cat ("H_IRent(2023):", var7," ")
cat ("H_IOwn(2023):", var8," ")
cat ("H_Vacant(2023):", var9," ")
cat ("H_Total(2023):", var10," ")
cat ("H_Totalred(2023):", var11," ")
cat ("H_WNewOwnOccup(2023):", var12," ")
cat ("H_IRentedSold(2023):", var13," ")
cat ("H_WOwnOccup(2023):", var14," ")
cat ("H_INewRented(2023):", var15," ")
cat ("H_IOwnOccupRented(2023):", var16," ")
cat ("H_ConstrVacant(2023):", var17," ")
cat ("H_IRentedVacant(2023):", var18," ")
cat ("H_IRentedSoldVacant(2023):", var19," ")
cat ("H_WOwnOccupVacant(2023):", var20," ")
cat ("H_INewOwnOccup(2023):", var21," ")
cat ("H_IRentedSoldMarket(2023):", var22," ")
cat ("H_IOwnOccupRentedMarket(2023):", var23," ")
cat ("H_WOwnOccupMarket(2023):", var24," ")
}
```
